rationale: Both reviews correctly catch the True-placeholder vacuity in ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup. Review 2's third finding is more precisely grounded: it identifies a concrete type mismatch — IsUnipotent takes GroupLike k A but the docstring claims it's about G(k) = AlgPoints k A (defined but unused on line 39 of the diff) — a directly verifiable inconsistency whose fix improves the PR. Review 1's third finding is a vaguer mathematical-roadmap opinion ('only identity satisfies') without a precise fix tied to the current code.
